description: Manifest of GitHub Releases for HyperTensor pre-computed W_proj caches. Each cache is keyed by its 8-character hex tag (the low bytes of cache_key). Released as one tag per cache so users can grab only the (model, rank, build) combination they need. The runtime auto-loads any matching ott_wproj_cache_*.bin in the working directory.

format_notes.header_layout: uint64 magic; uint64 cache_key; int32 n_layers; int32 which; int32 n; int32 _pad; then per-layer (int32 k_l, int32 has_mu, int32 has_mean, int32 _pad, then float32 Pt[k_l*n], optional mu_proj[k_l], optional mean_n[n]); then per-(layer,slot) W_proj records.

releases.title: GRC W_proj cache: Llama-3.1-8B Q4_K_M, k=1536 (build 2405A3B6)
releases.performance_notes: Headline-rank build. Throughput indistinguishable from baseline at +13.30% PPL (Paper A Sec 4).

releases.title: GRC W_proj cache: Llama-3.1-8B Q4_K_M, k=1536 (build 7CC1AFB6)
releases.performance_notes: Sibling build of the headline configuration. Identical layer-0 rank to 2405A3B6; included for the basis-build determinism check.

releases.title: GRC W_proj cache: Llama-3.1-8B Q4_K_M, k=1536 heavier (build D4DB0E08)
releases.performance_notes: Same layer-0 rank as the headline twins but 20% larger on disk: per-layer k distribution skews to deeper layers.

releases.title: GRC W_proj cache: Llama-3.1-8B Q4_K_M, k=2048 (build 626D1BB6)
releases.performance_notes: Quality-leaning rank. Above the L2-fit threshold for the 4070 (32 MB cache) so the cache-fit hypothesis predicts a hit-rate cliff here; see Paper A Sec falsification.

releases.title: GRC W_proj cache: Llama-3.1-8B Q4_K_M, k=1024 (build FFBC2BB6)
releases.performance_notes: Super-baseline configuration: 106.27% of baseline decode throughput at +61.4% PPL (Paper A Sec 4).

releases.title: GRC W_proj cache: Llama-3.1-8B Q4_K_M, k=256 (build 0A2337F6)
releases.performance_notes: Aggressive compression. Useful as a low-rank end-point for the rank-vs-PPL sweep.

releases.title: GRC W_proj cache: Llama-3.1-8B Q4_K_M, k=128 (build 199911F6)
releases.performance_notes: Floor of the rank sweep. Quality is severely degraded; included only for the spectrum-decay plot.

releases.title: GRC W_proj cache: SmolLM2-135M Q8_0, k=512 (build 3C2C89D7)
releases.performance_notes: Cross-model transfer pilot. SmolLM2 has n_in=576, so k=512 is near-rank.

releases.title: GRC W_proj cache: SmolLM2-135M Q8_0, k=512 (build A402C8CC)
releases.performance_notes: Sibling SmolLM2 k=512 build with a different per-layer rank distribution.

releases.title: GRC W_proj cache: SmolLM2-135M Q8_0, k=256 (build EB866869)
releases.performance_notes: Mid-rank SmolLM2 build (Paper A reports 1.45x decode ratio at this configuration).

use_instructions: Download the .bin file for the (model, rank) combination you need.
Place it in the working directory of geodessical (cwd, not next to the GGUF).
On startup the runtime computes the cache_key over (model hash, rank, slot config) and tries to load any ott_wproj_cache_*.bin whose 8-byte cache_key matches. Calibration is then skipped.
If the cache_key does not match, the runtime falls back to first-run calibration and writes a new ott_wproj_cache_<HEX>.bin that you can upload as a fresh release.
